voice_observations.caption_text:
The iconic Kardashian Jenner Family x Crumbl menu is here! 🤎🍪 Apr 7–12 👇

🎂 KRIS’ CLASSIC YELLOW LAYER CAKE (NEW)
Two layers of irresistibly fluffy yellow cake, swirled with decadent fudge frosting, topped with a smooth chocolate glaze and finished with delicate chocolate curls.

🍫 KOURTNEY’S FLOURLESS CHOCOLATE CAKE (NEW)
A luscious gluten-friendly chocolate cake made with zero refined sugar, drizzled with a velvety dark chocolate glaze and crowned with tangy raspberries.

✨ KIM’S SNICKERDOODLE CRUMB CAKE COOKIE (NEW)
A soft snickerdoodle cookie smothered in melted white chips, topped with a cinnamon streusel crunch, and drizzled with velvety white chips.

🤍 KHLOÉ’S COOKIES & CREAM SKILLET COOKIE (NEW)
A gooey dark chocolate cookie loaded with cookies & cream pieces, crowned with scoops of fresh vanilla bean cookies & cream mousse, and finished with a drizzle of chocolate ganache.

🧁 KENDALL’S COOKIE DOUGH CUPCAKE COOKIE (NEW)
A warm brown sugar cookie packed with rich semi-sweet chips, crowned with velvety cookie dough-inspired buttercream, crumbled cookie pieces, and topped with a signature Crumbl Cookie Dough Bit.

🎊 KYLIE’S PINK CONFETTI SUGAR COOKIE (NEW)
A vibrant vanilla sugar cookie rolled in playful rainbow sprinkles and crowned with a trendsetting swirl of pink cake batter buttercream.

🍪 DOUBLE CHOCOLATE CHIP COOKIE
A gooey cookie packed with milk chocolate chips, topped with semi-sweet chocolate chunks, and finished with a dash of sea salt.

Don’t forget, Minis are available all week long! 🍪
voice_observations.hook_text: The iconic Kardashian Jenner Family x Crumbl menu is here!
